projects.name: ChitraAI
projects.description: ChitraAI is an Android application that leverages the power of AI to generate stunning images from text prompts. Integrated with OpenRouter API, the app supports multiple AI models including Stable Diffusion, DALL-E, and more. Users can enter descriptive prompts and receive high-quality generated images directly on their mobile device. Features include prompt history, image gallery, and share functionality.
highlights: Multi-model AI image generation via OpenRouter
Prompt history and local gallery storage

projects.name: Hariom Machinery ERP
projects.description: A comprehensive ERP solution designed for Hariom Machinery to manage inventory, billing, customers, and suppliers. Built with React on the frontend and Node.js + MySQL on the backend. The system provides real-time stock tracking, automated invoice generation, customer management, and detailed reporting dashboards. Role-based access ensures that only authorized personnel can perform sensitive operations.
highlights: Real-time inventory tracking with low-stock alerts

projects.name: School Management System
projects.description: A PHP-based school management system with a multi-role architecture supporting administrators, teachers, students, and parents. Each role has a tailored dashboard with relevant functionality: attendance tracking, grade management, timetable scheduling, and parent-teacher communication. The system uses MySQL for data persistence and follows the MVC pattern for clean separation of concerns.
highlights: Four role-based dashboards (Admin, Teacher, Student, Parent)
